MODULE: cosmos.integration.cloud.azure_manager
FILE: cosmos/integration/cloud/azure_manager.py (847 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Azure Manager

"Good news, everyone! I can manage your entire Azure estate!"

Comprehensive Azure / Entra ID management for sysadmins.

Capabilities:
- Entra ID (Azure AD) user and group management
- Azure resource management
- VM operations
- Storage management
- Network configuration
- Secu

CLASSES:
- AzureAuthMethod(Enum): Azure authentication methods.
- ResourceState(Enum): Azure resource states.
- AzureConfig: Azure configuration.
- AzureResource: Azure resource representation.
- EntraUser: Entra ID (Azure AD) user.
- EntraGroup: Entra ID group.
- AzureManager: Comprehensive Azure management.

Prerequisites:
1. Azure subscription
2. App reg
